Companies - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025.

ARC's policy framework shall seek to ensure compliance with PML Act / Rules,

other related risks.

Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Risk Assessment by the ARC:
(1) The ARC shall carry out 'Money Laundering (ML) and Terrorist Financing (TF) Risk
Assessment' exercises periodically to identify, assess and take effective measures to
mitigate its money laundering and terrorist financing risk for clients, countries or
geographic areas, products, services, transactions or delivery channels, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: (ML) and Terrorist Financing (TF) Risk Assessment' exercises periodically to identify, assess and take effective measures

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The assessment process shall consider all the relevant risk factors before
determining the level of overall risk and the appropriate level and type of mitigation to
be applied.
enriched_requirements.object: risk factors before determining the level of overall risk and the appropriate level and type of mitigation to be applied

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While preparing the internal risk assessment, the ARC shall take
cognizance of the overall sector-specific vulnerabilities, if any, that the regulator /
supervisor may share with the ARC from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: overall sector-specific vulnerabilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The ARC shall properly document its risk assessment and it shall be proportionate

enriched_requirements.object: assessment and it shall be proportionate to the nature, size, geographical presence, complexity of activities / structure,

enriched_requirements.object: the risk assessment exercise, in alignment with the outcome of the risk assessment exercise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

at least annually.
enriched_requirements.object: annually

enriched_requirements.object: to competent authorities and self-regulating bodies

it is unable to comply with the relevant CDD measures in relation to the customer.
